name: Pan America 1250 Special
description: Get lost. Go anywhere and everywhere on the Pan America 1250 Special, with high-revving liquid-cooled V-twin power, semi-active suspension, and top-shelf components engineered to endure and explore.
beschreibung: Verliere dich. Fahre überall hin und erkunde alles mit der Pan America 1250 Special, ausgestattet mit einem hochdrehenden flüssigkeitsgekühlten V-Twin-Motor, semi-aktiver Federung und erstklassigen Komponenten, die für Ausdauer und Entdeckung entwickelt wurden.

specs.Valves: Chain-driven, DOHC, hydraulic self-adjusting lifters, intake & exhaust VVT; four valves per cylinder
specs.Air Cleaner: Downdraft intake, tuned velocity stacks, washable filter media
specs.Frame: Stressed-member, high strength low alloy steel trellis frame; stamped, cast, and forged junctions; MIG welded; aluminum forged mid-structure
specs.Front Fork: 47mm inverted fork with electronically adjustable semi-active damping control. Aluminum fork triple clamps
specs.Front Fork, Optional: 47mm inverted fork with electronically adjustable semi-active damping control and Adaptive Ride Height (ARH). Aluminum fork triple clamps
specs.Rear Shocks: Linkage-mounted monoshock with automatic electronic preload control and semi-active compression & rebound damping
specs.Rear Shocks, Optional: Linkage-mounted monoshock with automatic electronic preload control and semi-active compression & rebound damping and Adaptive Ride Height (ARH)
specs.Brakes, Caliper Type: Front: radially mounted, monoblock, 4-piston caliper; Rear: floating, single piston caliper
specs.Brakes, Rotor Type: Front: dual rotor, floating, tower- mounted; Rear: solid uniform expansion rotor
specs.Battery: Sealed, maintenance-free, absorbed glass mat (AGM) battery, 12V, 17.5Ah, 310 CCA at 0°F
specs.Charging: Three-phase, 45 Amp system (390 Watts @13 Volts, 1300 rpm, 585 Watts max power @ 13 Volts, 2500 rpm)
specs.Starting: 0.9 kW electric with direct drive starter motor engagement
specs.Lights (as per country regulation), Head: Daymaker™ Adaptive LED Headlamp with 6-segment LED banking lamp
specs.Lights (as per country regulation), Tail: All LED Tail/Stop lamp with signature tail lighting
specs.Gauges: 6.8 inch viewable area TFT display with speedometer, gear, odometer, fuel level, clock, trip, ambient temp, low temp alert, side stand down alert, TIP over alert, cruise, range and tachometer indication BT capable - phone pairing to access phone calls, music, navigation (H-D App ONLY)
specs.Vehicle Information Screen (Air temperat: TPMS, Engine temp, Battery Voltage, Ambient Air Temp
specs.Service Interval: First 1,000 miles (1,600 km), every 5,000 miles (8,000 km) thereafter

The frames are close-up shots focusing on specific parts of the Harley Davidson Pan America 1250 Special, highlighting its design elements and components. The images feature details such as the tank decal, wheel, and mechanical parts.
